parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": "{{ $('Calculate URSSAF').item.json.user_id }}",
  "channel": "email",
  "type": "urssaf_reminder",
  "subject": "Rappel URSSAF {{ $('Calculate URSSAF').item.json.quarter }}",

  "sent_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}",
  "status": "sent"
}
